name: playtest-check
_note: world-creator.playtest-check is the gate the DraftEditor 'Playtest' button runs before it POSTs worldPayload to /api/worlds to mint the real world. It is a read-only LENS_ACTIONS handler over the caller's own draft (per-user STATE, no cross-user reach). ready === (issues.length === 0); a missing spawn point is a blocking ISSUE (player has nowhere to land), while empty scene / no NPCs / no zones are non-blocking WARNINGS. worldPayload is shaped { name, universe_type, description, physics_modulators, rule_modulators:{...draft.rules, biome} } so it drops straight into POST /api/worlds. An unknown / not-owned draft id rejects with 'draft not found', never a throw. LENS_ACTIONS (path-3), not in the runMacro MACROS registry. Pinned behaviorally in server/tests/world-creator-lens.test.js.
